👋 **Questions are better handled in [Discussions](../../discussions).**

The Q&A category there is the right place for how-to questions, setup help, and anything open-ended. Issues are reserved for bug reports and feature requests so they stay easy to triage.

[Open a discussion →](../../discussions/new?category=q-a)
